Video.summary: After Johnny (Jay Kirby) is accused of robbing a bank, he runs into the hills. When his friend Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) hears what happened, Hopalong sets out to find the real bad guys.
Video.title: Lost Canyon

Video.summary: A former gunslinger survives his own hanging and transforms himself into a mysterious avenger of injustice.
Video.title: The Hanged Man

Video.summary: A Mountie (Russell Hayden) tracks mine robbers in 1890s Canada.
Video.title: 'Neath Canadian Skies

Video.summary: A young boy's camaraderie with wild animals comes in handy when he sets out to avenge his father's death.
Video.title: Call of the Forest

Video.summary: A Texas Ranger pretends he has been discharged from service to trick outlaws into accepting him into their gang.
Video.title: Code of the Fearless

Video.summary: President Grant helps a cavalry major (Dale Robertson) condemned for helping Dakota Chief Sitting Bull (J. Carrol Naish).
Video.title: Sitting Bull

Video.summary: Cattlemen offer a jailed cowboy his freedom if he will agree to help locate a gang of notorious rustlers.
Video.title: Born to Battle

Video.summary: A cowboy sleuth (Harry Carey) catches rustlers despite a rattlesnake.
Video.title: The Last of the Clintons

Video.summary: When the Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, the only surviving ranger dons a mask to protect his identity and swears to bring them to justice.
Video.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger

Image.alt: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger

Video.summary: Singing Billy (Roy Rogers) settles a case of mistaken identity with his sidekick, Frog (Smiley Burnette).
Video.title: Billy the Kid Returns

Video.summary: A rancher's son (Robert Walker) gets his foster brother (Burt Lancaster) in trouble with an unwed mother's brothers.
Video.title: Vengeance Valley

Video.summary: A cattle baron (John Wayne) tries to tame his wife (Maureen O'Hara) amid a feud with settlers and trouble with Indians.
Video.title: McLintock!

Video.summary: Frankie poses as a gang member's wife but gets caught.
Video.title: The Doolin Gang

Video.summary: A young woman meets an outlaw; Matt investigates a railroad holdup.
Video.title: Little Britches

Video.summary: A clever criminal hopes to rob a wealthy rancher, but Cisco and Pancho bring the man to justice.
Video.title: Big Switch

Video.summary: A prominent investment broker is captured after scheming to have two of his men impersonate Cisco and Pancho at a bank hold-up.
Video.title: Boomerang

Video.summary: Matt's old friend, Tom Horn, turns into an outlaw and starts a land war.
Video.title: Tom Horn

Video.summary: A crooked stagecoach driver accuses Cisco and Pancho of stealing $50,000 from him.
Video.title: Water Rights

Video.summary: An outlaw convinces the son of a former gang-member to join his gang.
Video.title: Black Jack Ketchum

Video.summary: An escaped convict is nearly murdered while trying to prove that he did not commit a crime.
Video.title: Convict Story

Video.summary: Little Joe runs into romantic complications when he tries to teach a deaf girl sign language; guest Albert Salmi.
Video.title: Silent Thunder

Video.summary: For saving his life, Ben offers some Ponderosa farmland to an American Indian.
Video.title: The Last Viking

Video.summary: An outlaw joins the Cartwrights' cattle drive, knowing it will take him to the town where his father is the sheriff.
Video.title: The Trail Gang

Video.summary: Attacked by Shoshones while crossing a burial ground, Adam discovers that the Indian woman tending him is white.
Video.title: The Savage
